channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: SCOTUS Decision Striking Down Racial Gerrymandering Shows Alito Plays The Long Game
item.description: Alito has a history of trying to figure out what can get him to five votes and how to use those votes to move the needle.

item.title: Two New Indictments Illuminate Chinaâs Unconventional War AgainstÂ The U.S.
item.description: China doesn't need missiles to attack the United States. They're already using hackers, spies, and meth engineers.

item.title: Hereâs How Trump Should Let Middle-Class Americans In On The Private Equity Bonanza
item.description: Giving Americans the option of investing in private investments via their 401(k) plans poses many risks; a different proposal may be better.

item.title: Hegseth backtracks on war-funding estimates at Senate hearing
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told the Senate Armed Services Committee on Thursday that the conflict in Iran was seen by President Trump as a histori...
